title: dolicholus pyramidalis
intro: Dolicholus pyramidalis, also known as the Pyramid Bugleweed, is a perennial plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dolicholus pyramidalis include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, sore throats, and digestive issues. Dolicholus pyramidalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
